category_sources: source_facts.description describes nx as a smart, fast and extensible build system.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is nx; source_facts.homepage points to the official Nx site at nx.dev.
docs_sources: Official Nx site provides the documentation section at nx.dev/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Nx release documentation states nx packages live in the github.com/nrwl/nx repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a build system; official Nx docs describe project graph, commands, and task orchestration.
